title: celtis tournefortii subsp. asperrima
intro: Celtis tournefortii subsp. asperrima, also known as the rough-leaved nettle tree, is a plant species in the family Cannabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Celtis tournefortii subsp. asperrima include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
